<!-- dropbox: https://www.dropbox.com/preview/CbDD_Dienstordner/literatur/altes%20corpus/chunked/chunked/Band08_chunk003.pdf#page=18 -->
<!-- citation-page-top: Band08 p134 -->

KIRCHDORF

<!-- header: KIRCHDORF -->


[[File:Band08_chunk003_p018_img001.jpg|thumb|Der Kirchenraum nach Weste]]



[[File:Band08_chunk003_p018_img002.jpg|thumb]]


134
<!-- citation-page-bottom: Band08 p135 -->
